channel.title: Causal AI daily picks
channel.description: Top-5 daily picks from new research, engineering posts, and tools across causal inference, causal ML, causal language models, and online experimentation.

item.title: Causal AI daily picks — 2026-07-23
item.description: 1. Efficient difference-in-differences estimation under partial interference with incremental propensity score policies — Causal Inference · score 68 · arXiv econ.EM · Junjie Li, Yukitoshi Matsushita 2. GAUGER: Generalized Regression Adjustment via Graph-Weighted Exposure-Level Residualization for Design-Based Inference Under… — Experimentation · score 64 · arXiv stat.ME · Lei Shi, Rita Lyu, Sizhu Lu 3. Identifying Treatment and Spillover Effects with Control-Based and Forecast-Based Counterfactuals — Causal Inference · score 64 · arXiv econ.EM · Viviana Celli, Augusto Cerqua, Guido Pellegrini 4. A Variance-Based Test for Heterogeneous Treatment Effects — Uplift / HTE · score 64 · arXiv econ.EM · Fangzhou Yu 5. In-House LLM Serving at Netflix — Causal LMs · score 61 · Netflix Tech Blog
